name: 31-parks-edition
description: 31: National Parks Edition — a vintage WPA-inspired card game prototype.

scripts.deploy:edge: npm run build:edge && npx --yes supabase functions deploy game
scripts.deploy:backend: npm run db:push && npm run deploy:edge
scripts.deploy:web: npm run build && npx --yes netlify-cli deploy --prod --dir=dist
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:web
